verifier.py line 50 defines ROOMS list; layout spec (setup_task.sh lines 34-51) describes 5 rooms: Reception Area, Open Workspace, Conference Room Alpha, Kitchen/Breakroom, Server Closet

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a fire evacuation plan diagram in draw.io Desktop based on a synthesized office layout specification. The layout contains 5 rooms (Reception Area, Open Workspace, Conference Room Alpha, Kitchen/Breakroom, and Server Closet) positioned with cardinal directions. The diagram requires 3 safety symbols (fire extinguishers, alarm station, exit signs), a minimum of 2 green egress path edges for the primary evacuation route, and optional assembly point and legend elements. Output files are saved as an editable .drawio file and exported as PNG image to ~/Desktop. All data is synthetically generated by task setup scripts, not from external sources.
